description: Authenticate as the main QA user (qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com) and capture browser session state for dependent journeys

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login and wait for the login form to load
Enter the email address qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com into the email input field
Enter the password from environment variable QA_PASS_MAIN (from .qa.env) into the password field
Click the Sign In button to submit the login form
Wait for the URL to contain /jp/ (dashboard or jobs page). Verify the redirect confirms successful login. Screenshot the post-login state.

description: Authenticate as the free-tier QA user (qa-jp-free@phronex.com) and capture browser session state for tier verification journeys

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login and wait for the login form to load
Enter the email address qa-jp-free@phronex.com into the email input field
Enter the password from environment variable QA_PASS_FREE (from .qa.env) into the password field
Click the Sign In button to submit the login form
Wait for the URL to contain /jp/ (dashboard or jobs page). Verify the redirect confirms successful login. Screenshot the post-login state.

description: Authenticate as the standard-tier QA user (qa-jp-standard@phronex.com) and capture browser session state for tier verification journeys

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login and wait for the login form to load
Enter the email address qa-jp-standard@phronex.com into the email input field
Enter the password from environment variable QA_PASS_STANDARD (from .qa.env) into the password field
Click the Sign In button to submit the login form
Wait for the URL to contain /jp/ (dashboard or jobs page). Verify the redirect confirms successful login. Screenshot the post-login state.

description: Authenticate as the pro-tier QA user (qa-jp-pro@phronex.com) and capture browser session state for tier verification journeys

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login and wait for the login form to load
Enter the email address qa-jp-pro@phronex.com into the email input field
Enter the password from environment variable QA_PASS_PRO (from .qa.env) into the password field
Click the Sign In button to submit the login form
Wait for the URL to contain /jp/ (dashboard or jobs page). Verify the redirect confirms successful login. Screenshot the post-login state.

description: Navigate to the JP dashboard and verify stats/panels are visible

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/dashboard
Wait for the dashboard page to fully load (no loading spinners visible)
Verify that stats cards or summary panels are visible on the page. Report the names/labels of any stats shown.
Take a screenshot of the full dashboard page

description: Navigate to the JP jobs list and verify the list or empty state renders correctly

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs
Wait for the jobs page to fully load
Verify the page renders either a list of job cards/rows OR a meaningful empty state. Report which state is shown and how many jobs are visible.
Take a screenshot of the jobs list page

description: Open the first job in the jobs list and verify the detail panel renders

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs if not already there
If jobs are listed, click on the first job card or row to open its detail view. If no jobs exist, navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs and note the empty state.
Verify the job detail panel or page opens and shows job title, company name, and description. Report whether the detail view opened or if the empty state was encountered.
Take a screenshot showing the job detail view or empty state

description: Navigate to the JP profile page and verify all profile form fields are visible

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/profile
Wait for the profile form to load
Verify that profile form fields are visible (e.g. name, bio, display name, or similar). Report the field names that are present.
Take a screenshot of the profile page

description: Navigate to the JP documents page and verify upload button or document list is visible

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/documents
Wait for the documents page to fully load
Verify that an upload button/CTA OR a document list (even if empty) is visible. Report which is shown and whether any documents are listed.
Take a screenshot of the documents page

description: Navigate to the JP config settings page and verify at least one configurable setting is visible

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/config
Wait for the configuration settings page to load
Verify that at least one configurable setting is visible (toggles, inputs, selects, or API key fields). Report the settings available.
Take a screenshot of the config page

description: Navigate to the subscription page as the free-tier user and capture tier info

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription
Wait for the subscription/tier information to load
Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label and any upgrade CTAs

description: Navigate to the subscription page as the standard-tier user and capture tier info

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription
Wait for the subscription/tier information to load
Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label and any upgrade CTAs

description: Navigate to the subscription page as the pro-tier user and capture tier info

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription
Wait for the subscription/tier information to load
Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label and any upgrade CTAs or absence thereof

description: Verify dashboard stat cards show numeric values and no JS console errors

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/dashboard if not already there
Verify that stat cards display numeric values (not placeholder text or empty). Report the labels and values of each stat card.
Check the browser console for any JavaScript errors. Report any errors found.
Take an annotated screenshot showing the stat cards with their values

description: Verify job search and filter functionality works or shows a meaningful empty state

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs if not already there
Look for a search input or filter controls on the jobs list page. Report whether they are present.
If search/filter controls exist, type a keyword (e.g. 'engineer') and verify the filter applies — either showing filtered results or a meaningful empty state. Report the outcome.
Take a screenshot showing the search/filter state

description: Verify job save/bookmark functionality — save a job, verify it saves, then undo

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs if not already there
Look for a save or bookmark button on a job card. If no jobs are listed, report the empty state and end the test with a note.
If a save button exists, click it on the first job. Verify the icon changes or the job appears in a saved list indicating it was saved.
Click the save/bookmark button again to undo the save (cleanup). Verify the job is unsaved. Take a screenshot.

description: Verify the job apply flow starts correctly from the job detail view

steps.description: From the job detail view (or navigate to it via https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs then click first job), look for an Apply button or CTA.
If an Apply button exists, click it. Verify the application flow starts — a modal opens, a redirect occurs, or a confirmation message appears. Report the outcome.
If no jobs exist or no Apply button is present, report the state and PASS with a note that the feature could not be tested due to empty data.
Take a screenshot showing the apply button state or application flow initiation

description: Verify AI cover letter generation initiates from job detail view

steps.description: From the job detail view (or navigate to it via https://app.phronex.com/jp/jobs then click first job), look for an AI cover letter generation button or CTA.
If found, click the AI cover letter button. Verify a loading or generation state appears (spinner, progress indicator, or generating text).
Wait up to 15 seconds for the AI generation to complete or show progress. Report the outcome — did it generate, timeout, or show an error?
Take a screenshot showing the cover letter generation state or result

description: Verify profile form updates persist after save and navigation

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/profile if not already there
Find a safe text field to edit (bio, display name, or similar). Note the current value. Edit it to a test value (e.g. append ' QA-test-marker').
Save the profile form by clicking the Save button. Verify the save succeeds (no error shown, success message or toast appears).

Navigate away to https://app.phronex.com/jp/dashboard, then navigate back to https://app.phronex.com/jp/profile. Verify the edited field still shows the test value. Report whether persistence works. Optionally restore the original value. Take a screenshot.

description: Verify document upload: upload test-resume.pdf, verify it appears, then delete it

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/documents if not already there. Note the current document count.
Click the Upload button or file upload CTA. Use the file input to upload the file at './fixtures/test-resume.pdf' (relative to the test runner working directory).
Wait up to 10 seconds for the upload to complete. Verify a document named 'test-resume' or 'test-resume.pdf' now appears in the list. The document count should have increased by 1.
Find and delete the just-uploaded 'test-resume.pdf' to clean up test data. Confirm it is removed from the list. PASS if the full upload-verify-delete cycle works. Take a screenshot.

description: Verify BYOK or API key input field is present in config settings

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/config if not already there
Look for a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) section or any API key input field in the config page. Report whether it is present and what label it uses.
Do NOT submit or change any API key. Only verify the field is present and labeled correctly.
Take a screenshot showing the BYOK/API key section (or its absence)

description: Verify YAML editor or advanced config section renders without errors

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/config if not already there
Look for a YAML editor, advanced config section, or raw configuration view. Report whether it is present.
If a YAML editor is present, verify it renders without JavaScript errors and shows some content or placeholder. Report the contents.
Take a screenshot of the YAML editor or advanced config section (or its absence)

description: Verify free-tier subscription page shows correct tier label and upgrade CTA

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription if not already there
Verify the tier label on the subscription page EXACTLY matches '{{expectedTierLabel}}'. FAIL if the label shows anything other than '{{expectedTierLabel}}'.
Verify an upgrade CTA is visible — a button or link prompting the user to upgrade to a higher tier. FAIL if no upgrade CTA exists for this {{expectedTier}}-tier user.
Check that no Pro-gated features appear unlocked for this free user. Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label '{{expectedTierLabel}}' and the upgrade CTA.

description: Verify standard-tier subscription page shows correct tier label and Pro upgrade CTA

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription if not already there
Verify the tier label EXACTLY matches '{{expectedTierLabel}}'. FAIL if the label shows anything other than '{{expectedTierLabel}}'.
Verify a Pro upgrade CTA is visible. FAIL if no upgrade CTA is shown for this {{expectedTier}}-tier user.

Check that a billing management link is present. Click it and verify it navigates to a valid billing destination (not a 404 or blank page). Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label '{{expectedTierLabel}}' and the upgrade CTA.

description: Verify pro-tier subscription page shows correct tier label and no upgrade CTA

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/subscription if not already there
Verify the tier label EXACTLY matches '{{expectedTierLabel}}'. FAIL if the label shows anything other than '{{expectedTierLabel}}'.
Verify there is NO upgrade CTA visible. Pro users are at the highest tier. FAIL if any upgrade button or plan comparison upsell is shown.

Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/portrait and verify the page is accessible without a paywall (no upgrade gate shown). Report whether the portrait page loads correctly. Take a screenshot clearly showing the tier label '{{expectedTierLabel}}' and the absence of an upgrade CTA.

description: Verify portrait page state and regeneration initiation for the main QA user

steps.description: Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/jp/portrait
Check the current portrait state. If no portrait exists, verify a locked screen with clear instructions is shown. Report what the locked state says.
If a portrait card exists, look for a Regenerate button. Click it and verify the regeneration process initiates (loading state, progress indicator, or confirmation message appears).
Report the overall outcome: was the portrait locked or accessible? Did regeneration initiate successfully? Take a screenshot showing the portrait page state.
